description: Author integration tests for the terminal plan-guardrail phase: RED <plan>/guardrails/ on merged HEAD → terminal halt (exit 2, work durable); B2(a) --revalidate-task plan:guardrails after a hand-fix → green/exit 0; B2(b) DAG-all-green+terminal-red plain run → all tasks skip, only terminal re-fires.
